title: US military plane uses Prestwick Airport before flying to the Middle East

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: US military plane uses Prestwick Airport before flying to the Middle East. 'Clear answers' have been demanded after a U.S military plane stopped at Prestwick Airport on the way to the Middle East amid the ongoing...
